summary: Lightwheel's $146M Series A and NeoCognition's $40M seed round headline a strong funding week across Santa Clara and Palo Alto, while Point2 Technology and Zūm also secured major capital. The region's tech hiring remains solid, with seven companies actively expanding; several networking and industry events run through Friday, including an AAPI mixer and AI workshop at the Rotary Summit Center. Earlier this spring, SiFive landed a landmark $400M Series G and Also closed a $200M Series C.
